flags: our damage is 4/5 magical — one enemy magic-resist item blunts most of it

notes: Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 0-3 into a numbers advantage.
Xeebs (offlane) was alive and never joined — get them to the fight and the count changes.
We took Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
Goldilocks324 (jungle) was alive and ahead in lane — a shove-and-rotate there flips a 2-3 into a numbers advantage.
We took Primal Fangtooth in the same window — read it as a trade, not a clean loss.
Their main damage was Sparrow (32k physical); 2/5 of us itemized armor.
Enemy ran 0/5 on or near their meta core — they were off-meta too, the win was there.

draftNote: 2 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane), Goldilocks324 (jungle→midlane).

threats: Chain-CC risk (4 hard-CC abilities, ~3.0s of lockdown): Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s), Riktor Riplash (pull), Riktor Shock Therapy (silence 0.8s), Riktor Skewer (suppress 1.25s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
Heal-stacking: Riktor. Anti-heal is mandatory against this comp — we brought none.
synergy: Little hard CC on our side — we can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
We have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Our damage is 4/5 magical — predictable; one magic-resist item answers most of it. Mix in a physical threat.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Windsurge engage → Cyclebreaker damage-reduction spin → clones from 84000 Hairs
ourKits.winCondition: stance-dance for damage or tankiness and overwhelm with clones
ourKits.playWith: a team that fights alongside his clones
ourKits.playAgainst: AoE clears his clones; CC him during the damage-reduction window

ourKits.combo: Energy Shield block → Displacement Blast → Assault Mode → GTFO lockon ult
ourKits.winCondition: out-trade with Pulsefire and the spell-shield, finish with GTFO
ourKits.playWith: peel so he can free-cast in Assault Mode
ourKits.playAgainst: bait Energy Shield, then commit; dodge GTFO's slow channel

ourKits.combo: Soulfire waves → Mortal Coil pull-zone → Stupor orb → Abyssal Rift zone
ourKits.winCondition: zone a fight with Mortal Coil + ult and chunk from range
ourKits.passive: consumes essences from kills for power
ourKits.playWith: frontline to hold enemies in her zones
ourKits.playAgainst: fragile and reliant on her zones — flank/dive around the telegraphs

ourKits.combo: Bull Rush knockback → Force Shield wall → Shield Slam knockup+stun ult, Shield Bash %hp
ourKits.winCondition: peel the carry with walls/knockups or engage with Shield Slam
ourKits.playWith: a carry he can wall for and peel
ourKits.playAgainst: his Force Shield blocks projectiles — reposition around it; bait Shield Slam

enemyKits.combo: Detection Protocol track → Chrono Swipe → Primeval Roar shield → Ursine Burst grab ult
enemyKits.winCondition: grab a key target out of position and burst them down
enemyKits.playWith: a team that collapses on his grabbed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: his grab ult is the whole threat — bait it / stay spaced; CC during Primeval Roar

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Riplash pull → Shock Therapy silence → Skewer suppress ult
enemyKits.winCondition: pull a target in and chain silence+suppress for a guaranteed kill
enemyKits.playWith: burst that deletes his pulled/suppressed target
enemyKits.playAgainst: respect Riplash range — stay spaced; cleanse/QSS the suppress

enemyKits.combo: Evade in → Barricade block → Spear of Nyr (execute <20%) → Coliseum ult arena
enemyKits.winCondition: trap a target in Coliseum and out-duel with stacked Gladiator
enemyKits.playWith: a team that joins him inside the Coliseum
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight him in his arena — disengage; burst through Barricade's window

enemyKits.combo: Piercing Shot poke → Heightened Senses AS → Hail of Arrows zone → Inner Fire ult
enemyKits.winCondition: ramp Relentless + AS and sustained-DPS the front down
enemyKits.playWith: heavy peel — she's immobile and pure DPS
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has zero escape — hard-engage her and she dies first

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over the per-event objective+tower stream; itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
